Architectural History I - First 8-week - 26048 - ARCH 1301 - BN1
3 lecture hours per week; 48 total contact hours. Credit: 3 semester hours. Part one of a survey of the history of world architecture from pre-history to the present. This course focuses on the period from pre-history up to at least the 14th Century. Course is intended to fulfill all or part of the following National Architectural Accrediting Board (NAAB) Student Performance Criteria: A.7 History and Global Culture
